sources_exist.note: Eight of nine canonical URL occurrences resolved. The exact GlobeNewswire URL at inputs.pi_moat.sources[1] did not resolve; a longer article URL with the same release identifier exists, but the canonical citation itself is unusable.

figures_match_sources.note: The cited pages do not support the claimed consolidator count, buy or exit multiple, succession percentage, EDDM prices, pricing mix, or moat figures. current_adoption_pct and historical_analogs have no URL at all and no auditable fallback research chain. The ESTIMATE_HEAVY flag is therefore unresolved across buy_mult, current_adoption_pct, exit_mult, historical_analogs, owners_60plus_pct, and t50_years.

judgment_inputs_plausible.note: The physical-distribution and secular-decline discussion is directionally plausible, but t50_years=7 is unsupported and the role model retains agency-heavy 5418 proxy weights after admitting several of those roles are virtually absent. It keeps full PR, market-research, creative, and management shares, puts field labor mainly in an unlisted residual, and assigns only 1.62% to demonstrators, so ai_replaceable_share is not a credible reconstruction of the specialized distribution industry.

rubric_consistent.note: The deterministic dataset copy and contribution sum are consistent. The assigned ARITH_DELTA_WITHIN_TOL flag on A, B, M, S, and V reflects minor stored-versus-recomputed differences rather than a standalone rejection. However, active_consolidators=0 is inferred from one strategic sale rather than a complete dated sponsor-platform search, the multiple evidence is not segment- and size-comparable, and the succession bonus lacks industry-specific documented-shortage evidence.

cross_checks_honest.note: The MELTING terminal classification is directionally candid, but no_proxy_confirmed relies on uncited adoption and analog assertions rather than a reproducible non-M&A chain. Pricing-model deflation and moat scoring also present unsupported revenue shares, price comparisons, switching-cost claims, and automation savings as sourced facts.

source_audits.note: The March 2024 release says Vericast agreed to sell its digital and print marketing businesses to RRD, including shared mail, free-standing inserts, and coupon clearing. It does not state an approximately $1.3B price, distress or debt restructuring, or establish that zero PE-backed consolidators were active in the segment during the required 24-month window; it is also older than 12 months.

The January 2025 page gives general marketing-agency EBITDA multiples, including 5.2x for traditional marketing and other category ranges. It does not contain the claimed BizBuySell 2.57x SDE figure or 3.0x-3.5x small-agency range, and it does not validate 3.5x EBITDA for physical advertising-material distribution businesses.

The December 2025 article reports packaging-sector PE median EV/EBITDA of about 5.8x in 2024. Packaging and logistics are not the assigned advertising-material distribution segment, and the page does not establish a 6.0x exit multiple for a $10M-plus EBITDA platform in NAICS 541870.

Gallup reports that 52.3% of U.S. employer businesses are owned by people age 55 or older and documents broad succession-planning gaps. It does not report the quoted 37% Boomer share, measure owners age 60-plus in NAICS 541870, or document an industry-specific succession shortage sufficient to support value 0.50 and the succession bonus.

The current USPS page lists EDDM Retail at $0.26 per piece and BMEU entry as low as $0.259. That contradicts the quoted $0.242 BMEU price and $0.242-$0.291 range, and the page does not establish private-distributor pricing or operator leverage.

The URL redirects to a MailPro EDDM postage-rates page stating a BMEU range of $0.215-$0.306 depending on weight. It does not support the quoted $0.242-$0.291 range or substantiate the claimed price comparison and pi_dist score.

The article describes declining print circulars and advocates digital alternatives. It does not contain the claimed 50%-75% digital-circular cost reduction, quantify switching costs, or provide evidence sufficient for the asserted pi_moat value.

The exact canonical URL did not resolve. A longer GlobeNewswire URL with the same release identifier reports 2.6% direct-mail spend growth in 2024 and a reversal of 2023's double-digit decline, but that does not make this unusable citation resolve and it does not establish the record's full moat and secular-trend claims.

USPS provides current per-piece EDDM prices, but it does not support the claimed 85%-90% per-piece distribution revenue share, 10%-15% targeting/design share, Valpak price, private-distributor range, competitive-bid structure, or conclusion that operators have effectively no pricing leverage.

reasons: At inputs.current_adoption_pct, replace the uncited 10% estimate with a current survey or auditable firm-level research chain measuring material AI use in the segment's automatable functions. The present fallback consists only of an assertion and cannot support current_adoption_pct=0.10.

At inputs.historical_analogs and inputs.t50_years, provide dated adoption observations with a consistent denominator for a comparable technology transition. The uncited 8-10-year assertion cannot support historical_analogs or t50_years=7.

At inputs.ai_replaceable_share.breakdown_by_role, rebuild the contaminated 4-digit 5418 proxy around this industry's field-distribution, routing, warehouse, and production labor. Do not retain full PR, research, creative, and agency-management weights while relegating the core workforce to an undifferentiated residual.

At inputs.active_consolidators.url (https://www.kirkland.com/news/press-release/2024/03/kirkland-advises-vericast-on-sale-of-digital-and-print-marketing-businesses), document the complete PE-backed platform and qualifying-add-on search over the required 24-month window. One stale strategic sale cannot establish active_consolidators=0.

At inputs.buy_mult.url (https://firstpagesage.com/business/marketing-agency-valuation-multiples-and-valuations/) and inputs.exit_mult.url (https://mergersandacquisitions.net/insights/packaging-logistics-mergers-and-acquisitions), replace generic agency and packaging benchmarks with segment- and size-comparable transactions or normalized credible comps for physical advertising-material distributors.

At inputs.owners_60plus_pct.url (https://news.gallup.com/poll/657362/small-business-owners-lack-succession-plan.aspx), provide current NAICS-relevant owner-age evidence and a documented industry-specific succession shortage before using owners_60plus_pct=0.50 and the succession bonus.

At inputs.pi_dist and inputs.pricing_structure.url (https://www.usps.com/business/every-door-direct-mail.htm), correct the obsolete USPS rates and source the actual revenue mix, private-distributor prices, bidding mechanism, pass-through treatment, and operator leverage before assigning pi_dist.

At inputs.pi_moat.sources, replace the unsupported Swiftly cost-savings claim and the non-resolving GlobeNewswire citation with accessible primary or authoritative evidence that directly measures substitution economics, switching costs, and durable moat in this segment.
flags_reviewed: ESTIMATE_HEAVY: 6 inputs with quality ESTIMATE (buy_mult, current_adoption_pct, exit_mult, historical_analogs, owners_60plus_pct, t50_years)
ARITH_DELTA_WITHIN_TOL: nonzero stored-vs-recomputed deltas on A, B, M, S, V
